commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc '
python3 - <<"PY"
import json, subprocess
sources = ["src_01KVSB50CJCYAJNW2DPR422TD9", "src_01KVSC92E11YFHB65GGTEEBB3S"]
for src in sources:
    print("SRC=" + src)
    for key in [f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/manifest.json", f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/draft_r1.json", f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/draft_r2.json", f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/approval_r1.json", f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/approval_r2.json"]:
        try:
            raw = subprocess.check_output(["aws","s3","cp",f"s3://bkk-election-images-prod/{key}","-"], text=True)
            obj = json.loads(raw)
            print("KEY=" + key.rsplit("/",1)[-1])
            summary = {
                "state": obj.get("state"),
                "current_draft_key": obj.get("current_draft_key"),
                "report_type": obj.get("report_type"),
                "area_id": obj.get("area_id"),
                "candidate_scores_len": len(obj.get("candidate_scores", [])) if isinstance(obj.get("candidate_scores"), list) else None,
                "candidate_scores": obj.get("candidate_scores"),
                "eligible_voters": obj.get("eligible_voters"),
                "voter_turnout": obj.get("voter_turnout"),
                "valid_ballots": obj.get("valid_ballots"),
                "invalid_ballots": obj.get("invalid_ballots"),
                "vote_no": obj.get("vote_no"),
                "abstained_ballots": obj.get("abstained_ballots"),
                "responded_at": obj.get("responded_at"),
            }
            print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=True))
        except subprocess.CalledProcessError:
            print("KEY=" + key.rsplit("/",1)[-1])
            print("MISSING")
PY'
